name: Sangria Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Strain the juices into a large pitcher.
2. Stir in the sugar until fully dissolved.
3. Add the wine to the juice mixture and stir gently.
4. Add ice cubes to serve.
5. Garnish each serving with a twist of lemon peel, if desired.
8 SERVINGS (approximately 1/2 cup each); 95 calories per serving.
